overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring petrochemical storage facilities, elevated highways, and transitioning from heavy industrial zones to mixed urban areas with steam vents and graffiti-covered walls under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: petrochemical facility street with storage tanks

events.description: futuristic white sedan drives past on the street from left to right
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the street
moving past the main tank structure toward the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to an industrial fence, observing the petrochemical facility and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic white car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial tanks with 'PETROCHEM' signage visible on the largest tank
tall wooden plank fence running along the sidewalk separating from the industrial facility
yellow industrial support structure with red and white striped warning markers
black street light and traffic signal pole on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of massive petrochemical storage tanks dominating the background. The camera walks steadily along a concrete sidewalk next to a wooden industrial fence. Two futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent street, and a few pedestrians are visible in the distance walking toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway with commercial buildings

events.description: entering shadow beneath the elevated highway overpass, creating mixed lighting conditions
slight left turn to follow the curve of the sidewalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure past digital billboards and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple top and jeans walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
pedestrian in dark clothing standing near the building wall

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars casting shadows
large digital advertisement display showing '106' on the building facade
tall glass and steel futuristic building visible in the distance between structures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered urban sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The lighting becomes mixed as the camera moves under the overpass structure. Digital billboards adorn the buildings to the left, and several pedestrians walk toward the camera. The industrial tanks recede into the background as the environment becomes more urban.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility perimeter with steam vents and graffiti walls

events.description: steam becomes visible venting from industrial pipes on the facility buildings
turning corner past industrial building revealing extensive graffiti on walls

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings with visible steam vents and graffiti-covered walls, passing a pedestrian in swimwear

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bikini top and shorts walking along the sidewalk toward the camera

entered.detail: low industrial building with yellow and blue structures emitting white steam from vents
tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge
silver metal pipe railing running along the right side of the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into bright sunlight, walking past an industrial building with active steam vents. Palm trees line the left side of the path while a metal railing runs along the right. The walls become covered in colorful graffiti, and a pedestrian in casual summer clothing walks past the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with smokestacks and distant city skyline

events.description: emerging into open plaza area with clear view of distant futuristic skyscrapers
approaching intersection with multiple vehicles visible on the cross street ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection with industrial smokestacks on the right and distant futuristic skyscrapers visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney with steam emissions and complex pipe structures
massive futuristic arcology building with curved glass facade visible in the distance
stacked red and green shipping containers near the industrial facility entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide industrial plaza with massive smokestacks dominating the right side. The view expands to show distant futuristic skyscrapers across the city. The camera continues walking toward an intersection where traffic is visible, passing shipping containers and industrial debris along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a heavy petrochemical industrial zone into a bright, mixed-use urban district. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a wooden fence, with massive storage tanks dominating the horizon as futuristic vehicles and distant pedestrians pass by. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts beneath the shadow of an elevated highway, where the industrial tanks recede and digital billboards emerge along a covered urban walkway. The scene then opens back into bright sunlight, passing active steam vents and palm trees while the architecture transforms into graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the path expands into a wide industrial plaza featuring massive smokestacks and shipping containers, before turning toward a busy city intersection with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance.
